raw.official description: Shadow Step reloads hellfire shotguns and has 25% increased range.
Leaving Wraith Form grants 30% movement speed for 2 seconds.
Leaving Wraith Form grants 40% additional lifesteal for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Shadow Blink

raw.official description: Shadow Step's cast time and cooldown are 25% faster, but the range is reduced by 25%.
raw.cast time: 1.15 + 0.13 seconds → 0.54 + 0.1 seconds
raw.ability details: * The initial cast time before you teleport is sped up, whilst the duration between teleporting and exiting teleport is left the same as before, however the total duration is reduced from 1.8 to 1.44 seconds, which matches the description's "25% faster". * Invulnerability starts much earlier at 0.14 seconds.

raw.official description: Collect Soul Globes from dead enemies to restore 50 health.
raw.ability details: * A Soul Globe drops as long as Reaper receives an [[Common Terms#Elimination|elimination]] credit from the kill.

* Counts all damage from Reaper, even from quick melee or [[environmental kill]]s.
* Does not generate [[ultimate charge]].

raw.official description: Refresh Dire Triggers' cooldown whenever using an ability or reloading.

abilities.name: Wraith Form

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Move faster and become invulnerable, but you cannot shoot.
raw.ability details: * Wraith Form is a [[channeled]] ability; Reaper cannot fire or use other abilities while it's active. * Reaper becomes [[phased out]], cleansing him of [[status effects]] and becoming immune to enemy damage and abilities. ** Reaper can still be hit by [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]], [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] and [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]] while phased, however these will only lock his movement, and will not deal any damage or interrupt the ability. * Automatically reloads Hellfire Shotguns to full ammo. * Can be cancelled early by reactivating the ability. * [[Health Pack]]s can be picked up while phased. * Wraith Form is not interrupted when pulled by [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]]. * Wraith Form's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

abilities.name: Shadow Step

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.duration:
0.53 seconds (teleport)
0.98 seconds (invulnerability)
raw.ability details: * Cooldown starts when the ability finishes casting. * Can only target walkable surfaces. * Can be used while Reaper is in the air, which will reduce Reaper's [[Movement speed#Falling|gravity]] by 70% while its being cast. * Shadow Step is a [[channeled]] ability; Reaper cannot fire or use other abilities while it's active and it is interrupted if Reaper is [[stunned]], [[knocked down]], or [[hacked]], including subsidiary effects. * Reaper becomes [[invincible]] 0.7 seconds into the startup animation, making him immune to damage, [[stun]]s and [[knockdown]]s. However, he is still vulnerable to being [[hacked]]. The invulnerability ends when the recovery period starts and Reaper is able to move again. * [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]] cannot be used on Reaper while he is using Shadow Step. * Destroys fences and other breakables in the target location.

duration.raw:
0.53 seconds (teleport)
0.98 seconds (invulnerability)

raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds animation
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 230 while firing (153.33 overall with reload) * Healing per second: 57.5 while firing (38.3325 overall with reload) *
''See also: [[Hellfire shotgun|Hellfire Shotguns Lore]]''

reload_time.raw: 1.5 seconds animation

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-reaper1.png|40x40px|middle|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shotgun|Shotgun ]] Shotgun (hitscan)
raw.official description: Use (RMB) to fire a volley with long range accuracy from both Hellfire shotguns.
raw.ability details:
* Damage per pellet is equal to 60% of the base Hellfire Shotguns' damage.
* Both shotguns will still fire even if there is only one shot left in the magazine.

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.damage: 185/s per enemy
raw.ability details:
* Healing per second: 46.25 per enemy
* Death Blossom locks on to all players and [[objects]] (barriers, turrets, traps, etc.) in its range that are within line of sight, and periodically fires toward each target at the same time.
** Targets can be hit by shots aimed at targets behind them, causing them to block it and take the damage instead.
** [[Barrier]]s do not prevent line of sight for acquiring targets.
* Cannot be manually canceled.
* Death Blossom is a [[channeled]] ability; Reaper cannot fire or use other abilities while it's active and it is interrupted if Reaper is [[stunned]], [[knocked down]], or [[hacked]], including subsidiary effects.
* Restores Hellfire Shotguns' ammo after the ability ends, provided it wasn't interrupted.
* Destroys nearby fences and other breakables.

damage.raw: 185/s per enemy
